title: coleus strictipes
intro: Coleus strictipes is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Coleus strictipes can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
